evals.prompt: I have a thread root event with ID aabb1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcd. I need to get all replies to this thread, including nested replies (replies to replies). Build me the Nostr REQ filters for this. Also explain what I'd need to do client-side to get the full tree.
evals.expected_output: A REQ message with two filters: one fetching the root event by ID, and one fetching kind-1 events with #e tag matching the root ID. Should explain that nested replies require recursive fetching client-side since a single REQ can't fetch an entire tree.

evals.prompt: I want to find all zaps (lightning payments) received by pubkey 79dff8f82963424e0bb02708a22e44b4980893e3a4be0fa3cb60a43b946764e3 across ALL their events, not just one specific event. What filter do I need?
evals.expected_output: A single filter using kind 9735 with #p tag matching the recipient pubkey. Should explain why #p is correct (zap receipts tag the recipient) and why #e would be wrong (that would require knowing specific event IDs).

evals.prompt: Build a subscription for a user's social feed. Their pubkey is f7234bd4c1394dda46d09f35bd384dd30cc552ad5541990f98844fb06676e9ca. I want to see their notes (kind 1), reposts (kind 6), and reactions (kind 7). Limit to the 50 most recent. Format as a complete REQ message.
evals.expected_output: A single REQ message with one filter combining the author pubkey with kinds [1, 6, 7] and limit 50. Should explain that this works as a single filter because all conditions can be AND'd (same author, multiple kinds via list OR).
